# Opslane

> AI-powered production error-resolution engine for browser JavaScript apps: errors in, verified fix PRs (or explicit needs_human incidents) out. Self-hostable via Docker Compose. Server code AGPL-3.0-only; SDK/CLI/shared types MIT.

This file indexes the agent-relevant documentation. All canonical content is plain Markdown in this repository. (Location decision: repo root, so it ships with every clone; recorded in issue #18.)

## Start here

- [README](README.md): what Opslane is, honest scope, architecture, licensing boundary, run-it-locally
- [Self-host quickstart](docs/quickstart/self-host.md): two paths — no-credentials smoke test (ends needs_human) and full error-to-PR
- [Install guide](docs/install.md): hosted setup and manual SDK fallback

## Architecture and trust

- [Architecture overview](docs/architecture/overview.md): components, trust boundaries, no-external-queue design
- [Life of an error](docs/architecture/life-of-an-error.md): capture → group → claim → triage → fix → route by confidence
- [Precision](docs/architecture/precision.md): exactly what "verified" guarantees and what it does not
- [Trust and security model](docs/architecture/trust.md): GitHub permissions, data flow, credential storage, masking, and honest gaps
- [Replay privacy](docs/guides/replay-privacy.md): what replay data may contain and how capture is controlled

## Guides

- [React](docs/guides/react.md): capture React 18/19 render errors with an error boundary
- [Vue 3](docs/guides/vue.md): capture Vue component errors with component context
- [Vanilla JavaScript](docs/guides/vanilla.md): initialize the browser SDK without a framework integration
- [Source maps](docs/guides/source-maps.md): upload Vite source maps and troubleshoot resolution failures
- [Connecting GitHub](docs/guides/github-app.md): configure a GitHub App or personal access token for investigations and fix PRs
- [Replay privacy and masking](docs/guides/replay-privacy.md): understand replay capture, masking, storage, and controls

## Reference (drift-checked against source by the pnpm test gate)

- [SDK options](docs/reference/sdk-options.md): every init() option with defaults, from SdkInitOptions
- [HTTP routes](docs/reference/http-routes.md): every registered route with auth mode
- [Environment variables](docs/reference/environment-variables.md): every var each service reads, plus known dead config
- [Reason codes](docs/reference/reason-codes.md): all 22 needs_human reason codes with remediations
- [Drift check](scripts/check-docs-drift.mjs): run with `pnpm docs:check`

## Contracts

- [Reliability contract](docs/contracts/reliability.md): machine-checkable correctness properties of the event-to-resolution pipeline
- [Session replay contract](docs/contracts/C4-amendments.md): chunk, pointer, scrub, retention, and evidence-lifecycle invariants

## Contributing and agents

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): repository conventions, verification requirements, guardrails
- [SDK README](packages/sdk/README.md): install, framework integrations, config table, privacy defaults
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/opslane/opslane-oss/issues (docs epic: #2)

## Not yet written (tracked)

- CLI reference: blocked on the CLI contract settling (issue #3, then #16)
- Production self-hosting operations: blocked on retention/backup readiness (issue #23)
